name: Irish Coffee Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sift together the first four ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar).
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients until moistened.
4. Fill paper-lined muffin tins nearly full.
5. Bake approximately 20 minutes.
6. Makes 12 muffins.
